hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_file_path" | grep -q '\.rs$'; then cd "$(cargo locate-project --message-format=plain 2>/dev/null | xargs dirname 2>/dev/null || dirname "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_file_path")" && cargo check --message-format=short 2>&1 | tail -20; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_file_path" | grep -q '\.scala$'; then cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || dirname "$CLAUDE_TOOL_PARAM_file_path")" && sbt --no-colors 'compile' 2>&1 | tail -20; fi
